title: Beyond Me Btw
fullDescription:
• Beyond Me Btw is a personal blog site where I share my thoughts, experiences, and insights on various topics.
• Features a clean design, easy navigation, and responsive layout for an optimal reading experience.
• Entirely coded from scratch and hosted on a self-configured nginx-ubuntu server.
• Serves as both a portfolio of my work and a platform for creating blog posts on various topics.

title: Gradient club website
shortDescription: The official website of the Gradient student Club at BMSCE
fullDescription:
• Independently designed and developed the official website for the Gradient AI/ML club at BMSCE from scratch.
• Built using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS with a strong emphasis on performance, responsiveness, and modern design.
• Created a dynamic content server and multiple custom pages to showcase events, team members, and club updates.
• Managed hosting and deployment on Vercel to ensure reliability, scalability, and ease of maintenance.
• Helped improve the club's digital presence and engagement with the student and tech community.

title: Mini's
fullDescription:
Minis is a live blogging platform created for me to share quick thoughts, updates, and ideas that don't require a full-length blog post.
• Conceived, designed, and developed as a way to publish more frequent, short-form content alongside long-form blogs.
• Built a custom backend with authentication and post management, separated from the main blog system for cleaner architecture.
• Designed a lightweight yet engaging frontend with an emphasis on readability and performance.
• Implemented posting functionality as the first feature, with plans for more interactive tools and integrations.
• Added prominent CTA buttons across Home, Blog, Projects, and About pages to increase visibility and engagement.

title: LUMEX AI
fullDescription:
• This project is currently being built.
• LUMEX (Live Understanding and Mobility EXpert) is an AI-powered real-time visual assistant designed to enhance user interaction with their environment.
• Utilizes advanced computer vision and machine learning algorithms to provide contextual information, navigation assistance, and real-time object recognition.
• Serves as a versatile tool for various applications such as smart homes, augmented reality, and personal assistance.
• Leverages the power of Lidar and depth cameras to create a 3D understanding of the environment.
• Enables features like obstacle detection and spatial awareness through advanced depth perception.

title: Real Time Driver Monitoring System
shortDescription: A monitoring system for driver fatigue and distraction
fullDescription: An AI-powered solution that monitors driver alertness and behavior in real-time, detecting signs of fatigue and distraction to prevent accidents and improve road safety.

title: My Library
shortDescription: A personal book collection management application
fullDescription:
• A digital library management system allowing users to catalog, search, and organize their book collections.
• Features include reading progress tracking and book recommendations.
• The book information is fetched from the Google Books API.

title: Pair Game
shortDescription: A memory matching card game with engaging gameplay
fullDescription:
• An interactive memory card game where players need to match pairs of identical cards.
• Features multiple difficulty levels, score tracking, and engaging animations.
• Based on the classic memory game concept, This was built as a project for an interview as a tech member of the Gradient AI/ML club at BMSCE.

title: Uncharted Lost Voyage
fullDescription:
• A digital treasure hunt hosted during Utsav Ananta 2025, where participants raced against time to solve puzzles and outwit competitors.
• Co-developed with event volunteers; I led puzzle design, system integration, deployment, marketing, and designed the event's visual artwork.
• Successfully launched as a playable online game post-event under a dedicated subdomain of the GradientAIML.tech website.

title: F1 Haptic Trailer: Android Recreation
shortDescription: A haptic feedback experience for F1 fans
fullDescription:
• Designed for Android devices and made as a web app
• A digital recreation of the F1 haptic trailer, optimized for Android devices.
• Features immersive haptic feedback synchronized with video content.
• Developed using web technologies to ensure broad compatibility.

title: Maze Maniac Resurrected
shortDescription: A Minecraft-based multiplayer gamemode for Phaseshift 2024
fullDescription:
• A comprehensive Minecraft gamemode created for the 2024 Phaseshift technical fest, featuring three distinct competitive rounds.
• Round 1: Skill-based minigames including Dropper Challenge, Find the Button, and Line Maze to test player agility and observation.
• Round 2: 4-stage PvE battle arena where participants faced challenging game bosses requiring strategic combat and quick thinking.
• Round 3: High-speed multi-style maze race combining parkour elements with complex labyrinth navigation.
• Successfully hosted 60+ registrations with 50+ active participants, making it one of the fest's standout events.
• Co-developed with my event coordinator Yashas we handled game design, system architecture, deployment logistics, marketing and visual artwork creation.
• The game was made with Minecraft version 1.20 for Java and you would need the same to run it due to the mods used.
• The game files are in the Github Repo, open that to download them

title: UCEED 2026 Score Calculator
shortDescription: An unofficial UCEED 2026 response sheet analyzer with smart PDF parsing.
fullDescription:
• Built a specialized tool to calculate UCEED 2026 scores by comparing student response sheets against the official answer key.
• Pre-extracted and structured the complete answer key into optimized JSON format (45+ questions) to eliminate redundant parsing and ensure instant, accurate comparisons.
• Implemented Levenshtein distance algorithm with 70% similarity threshold for fuzzy matching between user questions and official answers, handling formatting variations.
• Three-section scoring logic: NAT (14 questions, 4 marks, no negative), MSQ (partial marking support), MCQ (negative marking applied).
• PDF processing pipeline using PDF.js for client-side extraction with 50MB file validation and real-time async processing indicators.
• Drag-and-drop interface with section-wise breakdown, question-level analysis, and downloadable PDF report generation.
• Disclaimer: Unofficial tool for estimation purposes only; not affiliated with UCEED conducting body.

title: Mynyl
shortDescription: An audio player in the style of a vinyl on the web

title: Beyond Money
shortDescription: A personal money management app designed by and for myself

images.description: The home base. At a glance, you can see your latest transactions, your current net worth, and a month-based breakdown of income vs. expenses — everything you need to understand where you stand financially, right now.

A full history of your financial activity. Browse through all past transactions and filter by date, type, category, account, label, or any combination of parameters to find exactly what you're looking for.

Log any financial event — incoming money, expenses, or transfers between accounts. Transfers allow for seamless management across multiple accounts without double-counting. Each entry supports custom labels and descriptions so you can record context that matters to you.

Add and manage your cash and bank accounts, each displayed as a distinct card. View current balances, edit account details, and add new accounts as needed — keeping all your money in one organized view.

Track your credit cards and their usage by logging transactions against them. Set due dates for each card to stay on top of billing cycles. The Pay Bill feature is transaction-based — it records the payment as a financial entry rather than functioning as an actual payment processor.
Review a complete history of previously recorded card payments, giving you a clear picture of past billing and repayment patterns.
Monitor financial assets such as stocks, fixed deposits (FDs), loans, and other holdings in a structured, easy-to-read view. Keep tabs on what you own and what you owe, all in one place.
Stay on top of recurring expenses by managing all your active subscriptions in one dedicated space. Track costs, renewal cycles, and avoid surprise charges.
A consolidated view of your total net worth, factoring in all assets and liabilities. Understand the full picture of your financial health beyond just day-to-day cash flow.
Create and manage custom categories and labels tailored to how you think about your money. Organize transactions your way, with as much or as little granularity as you prefer.
Create and manage custom categories and labels tailored to how you think about your money. Organize transactions your way, with as much or as little granularity as you prefer.
A built-in currency monitoring and conversion tool to support international usability. Quickly reference exchange rates without leaving the app.

A dedicated sync page to ensure your data is always up to date and that the local cache reflects the latest version. Manual sync control gives you direct accessibility and confidence that nothing is out of date.

Configure the app to your preferences:  App Lock — secure access to your financial data Currency Preference — set your default display currency Data Export — export everything as a CSV or JSON file for external use or backup
